case_title: GERSHTEYN, ALEXANDER et al VS VAYNER, ALEXANDER EDUARD (FATHER) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GERSHTEYN, ALEXANDER MITSKEVICH, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT VAYNER, ALEXANDER EDUARD (FATHER) ZUBKO, IGOR ALEXANDER (FATHER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ALEXANDER GERSHTEYN RETURNED NO SUCH NUMBER.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT VAYNER, ALEXANDER EDUARD (FATHER) ZUBKO, IGOR ALEXANDER (FATHER)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERSHTEYN, ALEXANDER MITSKEVICH, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAYNER, ALEXANDER EDUARD (FATHER) ZUBKO, IGOR ALEXANDER (FATHER) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23166, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERSHTEYN, ALEXANDER MITSKEVICH, ELIZABETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VAYNER, ALEXANDER EDUARD (FATHER) ZUBKO, IGOR ALEXANDER (FATHER) JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23166 ON 7-11-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
